title: cranichis subumbellata
intro: Cranichis subumbellata, also known as the clubbed orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cranichis subumbellata include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the roots in hot water to create a decoction, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically as a poultice.
